reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag a target, giving Julian a stable target for his enhanced burst combo.
Julian's front-loaded damage fits Kaja's single-target pickoff pattern.

proof.summary: Kaja locks the target first, then Julian follows with an enhanced skill combo to secure the pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Kaja targets a carry or fragile core.
Julian prepares the correct skill order before the suppression starts.
Julian has cooldowns ready for the enhanced skill.
failureCases: Kaja locks a tank or low-value target.
Julian's enhanced skill is not ready.
Enemy teammates collapse after Julian commits.

reasons: Franco can hook or suppress a target into Julian's combo range.
Julian can convert Franco's catch quickly because his enhanced skill damage or control is immediate.

proof.summary: Franco creates the catch, while Julian follows with enhanced burst or control before the target can escape.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches a squishy or priority target.
Julian waits until the hook or suppression is confirmed.
Julian has the correct enhanced skill path prepared.
failureCases: Julian spends skills before Franco confirms the catch.
The target survives until teammates peel.

reasons: Mathilda helps Julian enter combo range without spending his whole skill pattern just to approach.
Mathilda's shield gives Julian more safety during the cooldown window after his enhanced skill.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Julian a safer entry and escape route around his enhanced combo window.
worksBestWhen: Julian uses the mobility to reach a real kill target.
Mathilda keeps the field available until Julian is ready to commit.
Julian has enhanced skill preparation before entering.
failureCases: Julian dashes in without enhanced skill preparation.
Mathilda's path pulls Julian into enemy crowd control.
Julian is punished after his enhanced skill puts all skills on cooldown.

reasons: Angela can attach to Julian and add protection when he commits to an all-in combo.
Julian benefits from Angela's shield because he is vulnerable after spending his enhanced skill.

proof.summary: Angela shields and attaches to Julian, helping him survive his dive and post-combo cooldown window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Julian fully commits.
Julian chooses a target he can realistically burst.
Julian has an exit plan after the enhanced skill.
failureCases: Julian commits into suppression or layered crowd control.
Julian fails to finish the target and exits with all skills on cooldown.

reasons: Floryn can support Julian from anywhere on the map during jungle or side skirmishes.
Floryn's global heal helps Julian survive after diving or after his enhanced skill cooldown window begins.

proof.summary: Floryn gives Julian global healing support so he can survive skirmishes even when the roamer is not nearby.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for Julian's real all-in or escape window.
Julian waits for Bloom availability before forcing risky fights.
Julian exits after the enhanced combo and avoids overextending.
failureCases: Julian is burst down before Bloom matters.
Julian overcommits into multiple enemies after the heal.
